de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions

Class JavaTypeToSortCondition

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions.JavaTypeToSortCondition
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VariableCondition

    public final class JavaTypeToSortCondition
extends java.lang.Object
implements VariableCondition
    Variable condition that enforces a given generic sort to be instantiated with the sort of a program expression a schema variable is instantiated with

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      JavaTypeToSortCondition(SchemaVariable exprOrTypeSV, GenericSort sort, boolean elemSort)

    • Method Detail

      • checkSortedSV

        public static boolean checkSortedSV(SchemaVariable exprOrTypeSV)

      • check

        public MatchConditions check(SchemaVariable var,
                             SVSubstitute svSubst,
                             MatchConditions matchCond,
                             Services services)
        Description copied from interface: VariableCondition
        checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled
        Specified by:
        check in interface VariableCondition
        Parameters:
        var - the SchemaVariable to be instantiated
        svSubst - the SVSubstitute (e.g. Term, ProgramElement) to be mapped to var
        matchCond - the MatchCondition with the current matching state and in particular the SVInstantiations that are already known to be needed
        services - the program information object
        Returns:
        modified match results if the condition can be satisfied, or null otherwise

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
